std_inline.citation:
'''Record of Charles White''': "South Australia - Newspaper Death Notices"
Genealogy SA; Notice: Mortuary Returns; Source: Register; Publication Date: 1872; Notes: Was a nephew of Major- General White, British army. Body: Age 18 years, 5ft 7in high; fair hair and complexion; a midshipman on board the ship Yatala. Conditions: Was killed by a fall from the rigging of the ship Yatala, in Port Adelaide, November 1, 1871. An inquest was held on the body at Port Adelaide on the 1st November, 1871, before R.J. Peake, Esq., and a verdict of accidental death returned
[https://www.genealogysa.org.au Genealogy SA] (accessed 6 May 2021)
Charles White.
